2162570.name: Cafe Simulator
2162570.description:
Bring your dream start-up to life!

Decorate your shop to attract more customers and manage day-to-day duties:

. Upgrade your equipment to improve quality.
. Hire and promote employees to boost efficiency.
. Make contracts with local shops to diversify your menu according to your customers' needs, improve customer loyalty, and earn more.
. Keep your inventory stocked full to meet the growing demand
. As you maximize efficiency, you can buy your alliance's business to produce your own goods, in the quality you like.
. Expand your brand from the suburbs to the metropolis.

Your decisions can make or break your business's growth, so plan wisely!
2162570.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
